content.en:
A Terran went to the Dao Realm to receive the legendary blood marrow liquid, and refined it here.

Rumble!!!!

His foundation continued to grow, his qualifications and potential were soaring rapidly, and even his cultivation had skyrocketed.

"A treasure against the sky!"

This celebrity was shocked to the Dao realm.

Such a treasure, the Terran Temple actually distributed it for free, and all the Terran to the Dao Realm can receive a copy, how much legendary blood marrow fluid does this have to take!

"This must have been taken out by the great Ye Ancestor, thanks to the Ancestor!"

A celebrity clan has a secret path in his heart to the Dao realm.

As the news spread, other Supreme Dao realms also came out of the retreat and came to the Terran Temple to receive the legendary blood marrow fluid.

And the forces outside the human race can only be envious.

Some of the Terran Dao Realm tried to snatch the legendary blood marrow fluid of the Terran to the Dao Realm, and after it was discovered, the Terran Legend's Dao Realm directly attacked, killed the Zhi Dao Realm, and erased the family behind it.

After several such incidents, other forces did not dare to do so.

Gradually, the supreme realms of the human race have all refined the legendary blood marrow fluid, and the foundation potential has skyrocketed, and the future potential is unlimited, and the children born will become extremely powerful in the future.

As for those ordinary humans, because there were too many of them, they were all over the human domain, and he couldn't make them all possess the legendary blood marrow fluid.

However, he diluted the legendary blood marrow fluid infinitely and let the people below distribute it, although it was not possible for everyone to enjoy the infinitely diluted legendary blood marrow solution, but at least it could be enjoyed by most human beings, and that was enough.

"In the future, the human race is afraid that there will be many Ninefold Dao Realms, as well as Legends to Dao Realms, and they will become the real top clans of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course.

The premise is that he has to become a patriarch, and let the human race give birth to a few more patriarchs.

The days that followed.

Ye Tian continued to retreat and cultivate, his first sequence of supreme Dao rule items had been exhausted, and the first sequence of supreme dao rules had comprehended the realm of one into nine, which was also very good.

His main cultivation content now is to constantly superimpose various supreme legendary bodies, and when he can't continue to stack them, he will impact the mythical Dao realm and become a patriarch.

......

The long years passed.

Ye Tian's supreme legendary body is becoming more and more.

Nine kinds!

Ten kinds!

Eleven!

Twelve!

If it weren't for the fact that he went to the Legend River Abyss last time and plundered a lot of the blood of the Legend of the Strongest, otherwise the blood of the Legend of the Strongest would really not be enough.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating the eighteenth Supreme Legendary Body to the consummation realm, and he felt that his body had reached its limit and could no longer be cultivated into the nineteenth Supreme Legendary Body.

"Limit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, his cultivation has also reached the current limit, and he can go to the Mythical Dao Realm.

......

"The breakthrough of the Legend to the Dao Realm is the Mythical Dao Realm, especially the Legend to the Dao Realm, which needs to comprehend the second sequence of the rules of the Dao, and also to transform the origin of the legendary power in the body into the origin of the power of the myth, so after breaking through, it can be regarded as stepping into the Mythical Dao Realm!"

However, such a breakthrough in the Mythical Dao Realm is only to reach the initial stage of the Mythical Dao Realm, but in fact, it is not a real Mythical Dao Realm, and it is necessary to cultivate the Legendary Body to perfection, and then transform into a Mythical Body, so that it can be regarded as truly reaching the Mythical Dao Realm.

Therefore, like Soho, it is not a real mythical realm.

But in the void realm, cultivation is a breakthrough, even if he is a patriarch, he is a real mythical to the Dao realm.

And it is too difficult for the Legendary Power Origin to break through, even with the help of the Second Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, it is extremely difficult.

Many legends reach the Dao realm, and even if they meet the requirements, they only have a 1 in 1,000 chance of success.

Ye Tian has comprehended the rules of the first sequence of supreme paths, and his success rate of breakthrough will be relatively high, but at most it is only a few tenths.

Therefore, he must also use resources to break through.

Just like Soho, he snatched the primordial black lotus before, and the primordial black lotus is a treasure that helps to break through, which can increase the success rate of nearly seventy percent.

And he also has treasures that help break through.

Ye Tian took out pieces of fragments.

This is the fragment of the Ancient Abyss Fruit that he snatched.

Ancient Abyss Fruit Fragments, taking them can promote the transformation of the origin of the power of legends, and 100% transform into the origin of the power of myths

This is the result of the identification of the Eye of Identification.

"Even if it's a fragment, it's a good thing!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, this thing can make a breakthrough, but how many fragments are needed will have to be tested to know.

"Then let's start breaking through!"

Ye Tian began to retreat and impact the myth to the Dao realm.

He swallowed a fragment of the Ancient Abyss Fruit and began to impact the Mythical Dao Realm.

Rumble!!!!!

After absorbing the fragments of the Ancient Yuan Fruit, coupled with the integration of the first sequence of supreme rules, the origin of the legendary power in the body gradually began to transform, but Ye Tian's legendary power origin was too strong.

He has cultivated a large number of Supreme Legendary Bodies, so it is more difficult to break through.

However, after he refined one Gu Yuan Fruit fragment after another, a wisp of Mythical Power Origin was born.

Rumble!!!!!

When this wisp of mythical power origin was born, it frantically absorbed the power source of legends, and more and more legendary power sources were transformed into mythical power origins.

At this time, he didn't need to consume the Gu Yuan Fruit fragments, and he could slowly make the origin of the power of the myth completely transform.

In this way, one era after another of the Solstice passed.

After about tens of thousands of Dao eras, all of Ye Tian's legendary power origins transformed into mythical power transformations, and his body also ushered in a transformation, and the strength and aura of the whole person have undergone earth-shaking improvements.

This moment.

Ye Tian is no longer a legendary Dao Realm, but a Mythical Dao Realm's elder.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's breakthrough movement naturally couldn't be hidden, and all the venerable elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance knew about it.

......

Sioux Domain.

Soho opened her eyes and looked at the location of the human domain.

"Ye Tian has broken through, his strength is already very strong, this breakthrough, his strength is far above that of ordinary elders!"

However, at this time, Ye Tian had not yet come out.

After Ye Tian got out of the customs, she went to congratulate her.

Another time passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's cultivation stabilized, and he announced that he was out of the customs.

Subsequently, an old man came to congratulate him.

And Ye Tian naturally entertained some, held a feast in the human domain, and also announced to the outside world that the human domain had finally given birth to a patriarch, and his status in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance was different from then on.
